name: Delete Node in a Doubly Linked List
description: Given a doubly linked list and a reference to a node to be deleted, delete the node. Handle head, tail, and middle cases. Update prev and next pointers accordingly.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 10^4]. -10^5 <= Node.val <= 10^5.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long doubly linked lists that punish repeated predecessor searches instead of one traversal to the deletion index
